name: Chocolate Grand Marnier Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 package Chocolate wafers (may substitute Low-fat Chocolate wafers); (9-oz)
1/2 cup Grand Marnier or other orange liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind chocolate wafers and almonds together in a food processor until pulverized.
2. Add 1 1/2 cups powdered sugar; process to combine.
3. Add Grand Marnier and corn syrup; process until mixture forms a moist mass.
4. Break off small pieces of dough and roll into 1-inch balls.
5. Place remaining 1 cup powdered sugar in a wide bowl; roll each ball in sugar to coat.
6. Store loosely packed between layers of waxed paper in a tightly covered tin.
7. Best if prepared 1 week before serving.
Yield: 4 to 4 1/2 dozen.
